Registry / Terms / indicating device

indicating device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00371 · 21 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 16 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

16 distinct definitions across 21 publications. 5 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

part of a measuring instrument that displays the measurement results
